description: Deal Detail Page — Replace SAMPLE_DEAL with Real API Data. CRITICAL: Entire deal detail page (deals/[id]/page.tsx 792 lines) is 100% hardcoded with SAMPLE_DEAL constant (lines 116-150) — zero API calls. The dealId from useParams() is captured but never used for data fetch (line 684). Must: (1) Replace SAMPLE_DEAL with trpc.opportunity.getById query using dealId param. (2) Add useRequireAuth() guard (F-03 — detail page is the only unguarded page). (3) Fix STAGES constant to match domain 7-stage enum (F-04 — uses CLOSED instead of CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST, omits NEEDS_ANALYSIS). (4) Fix StageProgress to use deal prop instead of SAMPLE_DEAL.value directly (F-05). (5) Remove _SAMPLE_ACTIVITIES dead code (F-06). (6) Add clickable links to account/contact detail pages (F-07). (7) Wire real owner data from getById relation include. Router getById exists (IFC-186). Cross-entity patterns from Lead 360 wiring (2026-03-04) should be followed. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 1.

wiring_complete.target: Zero SAMPLE_DEAL references; all fields from API; auth guard present

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
